'''gagïfjïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabesquery|arabesquery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabesquery|arabesquery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| gagïfjïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gægïfjïfth || gægïfjïfj || gægïfjïfsh || gægïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gagïfgïfjïfth || gagïfgïfjïfj || gagïfgïfjïfsh || gagïfgïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gagïfjïfth || gagïfjïfj || gagïfjïfsh || gagïfjïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gagïffjïffth || gagïffjïffj || gagïffjïffsh || gagïffjïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gagïfjïfïf || gagïfjïfïf || gagïfjïfïf || gagïfjïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || gagïfjïfth || gagïfjïfj || gagïfjïfsh || gagïfjïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gagïfjïfïfl || gagïfjïfïfl || gagïfjïfïfl || gagïfjïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gagïfjïfïfïf || gagïfjïfïfïf || gagïfjïfïfïf || gagïfjïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || gagïfjïfïfn || gagïfjïfïfn || gagïfjïfïfn || gagïfjïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gagïfjïfïforo || gagïfjïfïforo || gagïfjïfïforo || gagïfjïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
